_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.

claim.label: Biochemistry- Renal Function Test & Liver Function Test reports

ppd_preauth.q: Was the patient admitted with fever > 38.3 Degrees Celsius?

cpd_claim.q: Do the signs, symptoms and investigations (such as blood/ urine routine/ culture and biochemistry) confirm severe sepsis/ septic shock?
Is the discharge summary available with discharge advise?

common_queries: Fever not documented or below 38.3 Degrees Celsius
Complete Blood Count missing at pre-authorization
Planned line of management missing at pre-authorization
Indoor case papers missing at claim submission
Culture reports (Blood & Urine) missing at claim submission
Biochemistry (Renal Function Test & Liver Function Test) reports missing at claim submission
Signs, symptoms, or investigations do not confirm septic shock
Discharge summary missing or does not include discharge advice

additional_information.referral_criteria: Shock does not improve after 2nd fluid bolus, Signs of fluid overload, No facility for continuous monitoring, Before referral counsel the parents and inform referring facility
